content_of_post_to_comment:
Can I have your suggestion how can I do what I want, My body is dominated by my thought....

I have undergoing treatment of depression for nearly 3 years. The trigger is my mother's death due to lung cancer, and the longtime of terrible verbal abused by my father. I am currently majoring biology, but I have not been able to finish any of the courses for two years. A little mistake, missed the morning class or can't finish the assignment on time, could immediately turned me into a coward. I started hiding in my room, not going to uni, not doing anything what I suppose to finish. However, due to the financial stress, I have to go to work to support my daily life and medication spends. But I didn't find any difficultly once I am on work, especially on the socialising aspect. Except, I need a long self time to get recovery from such activities.

I really wanna to know, if there is anyone, who had been through a similar situation as me, be able to share their experience to getting their life under control. I do need help so so badly.

Thank you , and love you all...
